title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
